stemHtml:
Given:

Estimated Time of Departure A 15° 15.0’N, 072° 06.0’W on 12 March is 01:00 ST ST = UTC -5hr
Estimated Time of Arrival B 55° 18.0’N, 005° 45.0’E 16:15 ST on the same date ST = UTC +1hr

According to the Jeppesen table sunset at B takes place at 18:20.Calculate the flight time from A to B and the time between arrival and sunset at B.
